mapper.select:
SELECT mpi.PRODUCT_ID as productId, mpi.PRODUCT_CODE as productCode, mpi.PRODUCT_CODE_NAME as productCodeName, mpi.VENDOR_CODE as vendorCode, mv.vendor_name as vendorName, mpi.STATUS as status, mpi.REG_DATE as regDate FROM MA_PRODUCT_ID mpi LEFT JOIN MA_VENDOR mv ON mpi.vendor_code = mv.vendor_code WHERE 1 = 1
AND mpi.product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCode} , '%')
AND mpi.product_code_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCodeName}, '%')
AND mv.vendor_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vendorName}, '%')
AND mv.productId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productId}, '%')
and mpi.user_company_code = #{userCompanyCode}
and mpi.user_company_code IS NULL
and status = #{status}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CONCAT('P',LPAD(CAST(IFNULL(SUBSTRING(MAX(product_id), 2), '0000000') + 1 AS CHAR), 7, '0' )) FROM MA_PRODUCT_ID
INSERT INTO MA_PRODUCT_ID ( product_id, product_code, product_code_name, vendor_code, status, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productCodeName}, #{vendorCode}, 1, CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d') AS UNSIGNED) )
